rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Facts Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday November 01, 2019 Line 01. PLAINTIFF REEF SHAFER Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Facts Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions Hearing Required. By no later than November 1, 2019 by 8:30 a.m. Ms. Overton to produce a copy of the file endorsed copy of the substitution of attorney referenced in August 26, 2019 e-mail (time-stamped 11:14 a.m.) attached as exhibit C to Truong Declaration. Ms. Overton to also provide the e-filing transaction number for this Substitution of Attorney. If Plaintiff has an endorsed copy of this substitution, Plaintiff shall provide the Court a copy by no later than 8:30 a.m. on November 1, 2019. =(501/CFH)
